creator: beerml@sigma6audio.de
text:
Created attachment 182832
svn diff of audio/ardour5

New version of Ardour was released.

Soon or later we will see a v6 as a direct continuation.
I think, if we want to keep the old 'ardour' port which is ardour v2
we should rename the old ardour port to ardour2
and ardour5 to ardour. Ardour5 will not stay if there is a v6.
